Returns the display value for dropdown list usage.

Returns the display value for dropdown list usage.

Returns the display value for dropdown list usage.

Returns the display value for dropdown list usage.
getWhereClause(AttachmentDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<AttachmentDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.AttachmentDAOImpl
Builds and returns the list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering AttachmentDTO search results.
getWhereClause(CollegeDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<CollegeDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.CollegeDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering college records based on the non-empty fields of the given CollegeDTO.
getWhereClause(CourseDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<CourseDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.CourseDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering course records based on the non-empty fields of the given CourseDTO.
getWhereClause(FacultyDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<FacultyDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.FacultyDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering faculty records based on the non-empty fields of the given FacultyDTO.
getWhereClause(MarksheetDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<MarksheetDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.MarksheetDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering marksheet records based on the non-empty fields of the given MarksheetDTO.
getWhereClause(RoleDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<RoleDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.RoleDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering role records based on the non-empty or non-zero fields of the given RoleDTO.
getWhereClause(StudentDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<StudentDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.StudentDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering student records based on the non-empty or non-null fields of the given StudentDTO.
getWhereClause(SubjectDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<SubjectDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.SubjectDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering subject records based on the non-empty fields of the given SubjectDTO.
getWhereClause(TimetableDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<TimetableDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.TimetableDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering timetable records based on the non-empty fields of the given TimetableDTO.
getWhereClause(UserDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<UserDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.UserDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering user records based on the non-empty or non-null fields of the given UserDTO.
getWhereClause(T, CriteriaBuilder, Root<T>) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl
Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering search results based on the given DTO's field values.
